service.description: Rolling-window anomaly scan over GqlQueryLog. Groups log rows by userId in the current window (now - windowMinutes .. now), computes per-caller volume / reject-rate / cost, and emits a WARN log + a GqlAnomalyAlert row for each (caller, metric) breach. Deduplicates: at most one alert per (caller, metric, window). Fail-safe: any uncaught exception is logged as WARN and the service returns gracefully so the scheduler is never poisoned. Out params: callersScanned (int), anomaliesFound (int).
